heading: Courts defined
label: 963 Courts defined
text: As used in this chapter, unless the context indicates otherwise, the words “court” and “courts” include the Supreme Court of the United States and the courts enumerated in .section 610 of this title
notes: Historical and Revision NotesThis section was included to embrace the Supreme Court and all courts under the supervision of the Administrative Office of the United States Courts. See and reviser’s note thereunder.section 610 of this title
